title: 综合实战复盘：从询价到售后完整订单
theme: 从 order lifecycle / project recap / final recap 开始
goals: 能把客户从询价、需求确认、报价、样品、PI、付款、生产、物流到售后的完整流程串起来
能用 requirement summary、commercial terms 和 approval chain 做清晰复盘
能在长对话中自然处理价格、交期、样品确认、付款、物流异常和售后反馈

review.title: Day 29 复习
items: 昨天练了 follow-up、quotation follow-up、sample feedback、decision timeline、next step、pending decision、gentle reminder 和 reconnect。
长期客户跟进的关键是给客户一个容易回复的问题，而不是只问 any update。
今天做 30 天最终综合实战，把询价到售后的核心能力放进一条完整订单流程里。

preview.scenario: 客户从第一次询价开始，逐步确认规格、数量、价格、样品、PI、付款、生产、物流和售后问题。你需要像真实外贸销售一样，逐步确认信息、推进订单、处理异常并做最终复盘。
needToKnow: order lifecycle 是完整订单生命周期，不只是报价或出货其中一步。
project recap 用于阶段性总结，让客户确认你们对需求、价格、交期和下一步理解一致。
final recap 是最后复盘，适合在课程结束或项目结束时总结经验和后续动作。

vocabulary.meaning: 订单生命周期 / 订单完整流程
vocabulary.usage: 用于从询价、报价、付款、生产、出货到售后的完整流程。
vocabulary.example: This lesson reviews the full order lifecycle from inquiry to after-sales support.

vocabulary.meaning: 项目复盘 / 项目阶段总结
vocabulary.usage: 用于给客户总结项目进展、已确认事项和未决事项。
vocabulary.example: Let me send a project recap so we are aligned on all details.

vocabulary.usage: 用于把客户的产品规格、数量、包装、颜色、交期等需求整理成清单。
vocabulary.example: Here is the requirement summary for your confirmation.

vocabulary.usage: 用于价格、付款、交期、样品费、运费和有效期等交易条件。
vocabulary.example: Please review the commercial terms before we prepare the PI.

vocabulary.meaning: 审批链 / 内部审批流程
vocabulary.usage: 用于客户内部需要采购、工程、财务或老板确认的流程。
vocabulary.example: Could you let us know who is involved in the approval chain?

vocabulary.usage: 用于货物发出后继续跟进物流、清关、到货和异常。
vocabulary.example: We will handle the shipment follow-through until the goods arrive.

vocabulary.usage: 用于到货后客户反馈破损、缺件、质量问题或补救方案。
vocabulary.example: Our team will support the after-sales handling if any issue appears.

vocabulary.meaning: 最终复盘 / 最终总结
vocabulary.usage: 用于项目完成后总结已完成事项、问题、经验和后续合作动作。
vocabulary.example: Let me give you a final recap of the full order process.

sentences.label: 总结完整订单流程
sentences.natural: This lesson reviews the full order lifecycle from inquiry to after-sales support.
sentences.business: This final lesson reviews the full order lifecycle, including inquiry, quotation, sample approval, PI, payment, production, shipment follow-through, and after-sales handling.

sentences.label: 整理客户需求
sentences.natural: Here is the requirement summary for your confirmation.
sentences.business: Here is the requirement summary for your confirmation, including quantity, color, material, packing, delivery time, and shipping method.

sentences.label: 确认商务条款
sentences.natural: Please review the commercial terms before we prepare the PI.
sentences.business: Please review the commercial terms, including unit price, payment terms, lead time, validity, and shipping arrangement before we prepare the PI.

sentences.label: 了解客户内部审批
sentences.natural: Could you let us know who is involved in the approval chain?
sentences.business: Could you let us know who is involved in the approval chain so we can provide the right documents and support your internal review?

sentences.label: 做最终复盘
sentences.natural: Let me give you a final recap of the full order process.
sentences.business: Let me give you a final recap of the full order process, including what was confirmed, what changed, what issues appeared, and what we should improve for the next order.

chatAnalysis.problem: 太笼统，客户不知道要确认哪些细节，容易漏掉颜色、包装、交期或运输方式。
chatAnalysis.better: Here is the requirement summary for your confirmation.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Here is the requirement summary for your confirmation, including quantity, color, material, packing, delivery time, and shipping method.

chatAnalysis.problem: 表达不专业，也没有包含付款条款、有效期、交期和发货安排。
chatAnalysis.better: Please review the commercial terms before we prepare the PI.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Please review the commercial terms, including unit price, payment terms, lead time, validity, and shipping arrangement before we prepare the PI.

chatAnalysis.problem: follow goods 不自然，也没有说明会跟进物流、清关、到货和售后。
chatAnalysis.better: We will handle the shipment follow-through until the goods arrive.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: We will handle the shipment follow-through until the goods arrive and support the after-sales handling if any issue appears.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you summarize what we confirmed?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. Here is the requirement summary for your confirmation.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please include quantity, color, packing, and delivery time.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: No problem. I will include all these details in the summary.

dialogues.title: 正常商务版：确认商务条款

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Please review the commercial terms before we prepare the PI.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: What terms should I check?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Please check the unit price, payment terms, lead time, validity, and shipping arrangement.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Okay. I will review them with our purchasing manager today.

dialogues.title: 压力场景版：订单结束后复盘

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: This order had delays and some after-sales issues.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand. Let me give you a final recap of the full order process.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please also include what you will improve next time.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will include what was confirmed, what changed, what issues appeared, and how we will improve for the next order.

longDialogues.title: 长对话实战：从询价到售后的一条完整订单

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Hi, we are looking for a new product for our next promotion.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. Could you please share the product size, material, quantity, target delivery time, and destination country?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We need five thousand pieces, matte finish, custom logo, and delivery to Los Angeles.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. Let me prepare a requirement summary so we are aligned on all details.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please also include the packaging details.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Of course. The requirement summary will include quantity, color, material, logo, packing, delivery time, and shipping method.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you send the quotation today?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes. I will check the cost with our factory and send the quotation today.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Your price is a little higher than another supplier.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand. It is difficult to compare prices without checking the same specifications, packing, and quality standard.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: If we increase the quantity, can you improve the price?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes. If the quantity increases, we can review better bulk pricing and send you an updated offer.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Before we place the order, we need a sample.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: No problem. We can arrange the sample and confirm the sample cost and shipping cost first.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you provide the sample without charge?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: We can support the sample without charge as a concession, but the sample shipping cost needs to be covered by your side.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Okay. After we approve the sample, what is the next step?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: After sample approval, please confirm the final quantity and commercial terms, then we can prepare the PI.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: What commercial terms should we review?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Please review the unit price, payment terms, lead time, validity, and shipping arrangement.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Our approval chain includes purchasing, finance, and the sales director.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. Since several people are involved in the approval chain, I can provide the quotation, sample photos, packing details, and PI for your internal review.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please send the PI once the sample is approved.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. Once the sample is approved, I will prepare the PI with the confirmed commercial terms.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We have paid the deposit. Please start production.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. We have received the deposit and will arrange production start today.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please keep us updated during production.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will send production updates, packing photos, and the final check result before shipment.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: The schedule is urgent. Can you avoid any delay?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: We will push the factory and keep you posted, but I will also give you a realistic timeline if any issue appears.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: The goods are ready now. Please arrange shipment.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. Please confirm the delivery address, consignee information, and shipping method so we can arrange shipment release.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: After shipment, please follow the tracking closely.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: No problem. We will handle the shipment follow-through until the goods arrive.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: The tracking shows customs hold. What should we do?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: The shipment is currently waiting for customs review. We are checking the clearance status with the forwarder.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please update us today.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Understood. I will contact the forwarder now and send you the latest update today.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We received the goods, but two cartons were damaged.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I am sorry to hear that. Please send us clear photos of the damaged goods, inner packing, and outer cartons.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We will send the photos now.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. We will support the after-sales handling after we confirm the photos and damaged quantity.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you also summarize the whole order for our records?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. Let me send a project recap first, then I will give you a final recap of the full order process.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please include what was confirmed, what changed, and what should improve next time.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Of course. The final recap will include confirmed requirements, commercial terms, sample approval, payment, production, shipment follow-through, after-sales handling, and improvement points for the next order.

exercises.prompt: 中译英：这节最终课程复盘完整订单流程，包括询价、报价、样品确认、PI、付款、生产、出货跟进和售后处理。
exercises.answer: This final lesson reviews the full order lifecycle, including inquiry, quotation, sample approval, PI, payment, production, shipment follow-through, and after-sales handling.
acceptable: this final lesson reviews the full order lifecycle including inquiry quotation sample approval pi payment production shipment follow-through and after-sales handling
this lesson reviews the full order lifecycle including inquiry quotation sample approval pi payment production shipment follow-through and after-sales handling
exercises.hint: order lifecycle 是完整订单流程。

exercises.prompt: 把这句话改得更专业：all details okay?
exercises.answer: Here is the requirement summary for your confirmation, including quantity, color, material, packing, delivery time, and shipping method.
acceptable: here is the requirement summary for your confirmation including quantity color material packing delivery time and shipping method
here is the requirement summary for your confirmation including quantity color material packaging delivery time and shipping method
exercises.hint: 不要笼统问 all details，要列出客户需要确认的项目。

exercises.prompt: 填空：Please review the commercial ____ before we prepare the PI.
客户内部需要采购、财务和老板确认，哪个问题更专业？
options: Could you let us know who is involved in the approval chain so we can provide the right documents?
exercises.answer: Could you let us know who is involved in the approval chain so we can provide the right documents?
acceptable: could you let us know who is involved in the approval chain so we can provide the right documents
exercises.hint: approval chain 用于客户内部审批流程。

exercises.prompt: 中译英：我们会持续跟进出货直到货物到达，并在出现任何问题时支持售后处理。
exercises.answer: We will handle the shipment follow-through until the goods arrive and support the after-sales handling if any issue appears.
acceptable: we will handle the shipment follow-through until the goods arrive and support the after-sales handling if any issue appears
we will handle shipment follow-through until the goods arrive and support after-sales handling if any issue appears
exercises.hint: shipment follow-through 是出货后续跟进，after-sales handling 是售后处理。

exercises.prompt: 客户说：Can you summarize the whole order for our records? 你应该怎么回复？
exercises.answer: Sure. I will send a final recap including confirmed requirements, commercial terms, sample approval, payment, production, shipment follow-through, after-sales handling, and improvement points.
acceptable: sure i will send a final recap including confirmed requirements commercial terms sample approval payment production shipment follow-through after-sales handling and improvement points
sure i will send a final recap including the confirmed requirements commercial terms sample approval payment production shipment follow-through after-sales handling and improvement points
exercises.hint: final recap 要覆盖整个订单流程和改进点。

homework: 把 order lifecycle、project recap、requirement summary、commercial terms、approval chain、shipment follow-through、after-sales handling、final recap 各造 1 句。
把 5 个核心句子的 business 版本各读 5 遍，重点练 requirement summary、commercial terms 和 final recap。
写一段完整 WhatsApp 复盘：客户要求你总结一个订单，你要覆盖需求、报价、样品、PI、付款、生产、物流、售后问题和下一单改进点。
tomorrow: 30 天课程已完成。建议从 Day 01 到 Day 30 复听长对话，并把每一天的 business 句子改写成自己的真实客户话术。
